---
title: "QC Reflection"
format:
  html:
    filters:
      - qc-atelier/qc-reflect/qc-reflect-filter.lua
---

This document triggers the generation of the qualitative coding reflection tool.
The output is written to `qc/qc-reflect.html` and can be opened directly in a browser
(served via `python3 -m http.server 8080` from the `qc/` directory with `OLLAMA_ORIGINS="*" ollama serve`).
